description_long: This is an ornate, dark-toned sculpture featuring a detailed pedestal with elaborate floral and draped garland motifs. The base is octagonal and tiered, with a prominent central section adorned with raised decorative elements. Atop the pedestal stands a small, finely sculpted human figure, possibly a classical or allegorical subject, rendered in a dynamic pose. The surface appears to be made of a dark metal, likely bronze, with a patina that enhances the intricate details. The base is robust and solid, suggesting significant weight and stability. The overall craftsmanship and style indicate it is intended as a decorative or commemorative piece for public or formal urban spaces.
description: A dark, ornate sculpture with a tiered octagonal base and a finely detailed human figure on top, featuring elaborate floral and garland motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed garland and floral motifs on the pedestal, with the human figure clearly visible atop the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the relief decorations and the layered structure of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view with the figure partially obscured, focusing on the back of the pedestal and its ornate detailing.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the intricate carvings and the robust, tiered base.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure on ornate pedestal with floral motifs
attribute_location_context: No visible context; likely intended for outdoor plazas, parks, or formal urban settings.
